title: Wynntils Ultimate
description: A lightweight wynntils experience enhancer modpack.
body:
# What is this modpack?
Wynntils Ultimate is a list of fabric mods configured to enhance your experience in [Wynncraft](https://wynncraft.com/)  on the currently latest version of minecraft.
This modpack contains several performance enhancer mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling).
You can even apply shaders to further improve quality.

The gameplay is modified by [Wynntils](https://wynntils.com/) and [Voices of Wynn](https://voicesofwynn.com/) which adds spoken dialoges to the game.

For a more emmersive experience the modpack contains the [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) mod which allows you to set the render distance to insane hights while the performance is mostly the same.

![Gavel image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sKLQJKy5/images/74069a6a681f4e8ee160026e94f15ec9fdd84c7d.png)
